name: PointContainment
summary: Defines enumerated values for closed curve/point spatial relationships.

enum_values.name: Inside
enum_values.summary: Point is on the interior of the region implied by the closed curve.

enum_values.name: Outside
enum_values.summary: Point is on the exterior of the region implied by the closed curve.

enum_values.name: Coincident
enum_values.summary: Point is coincident with the curve and therefor neither inside not outside.
